split.lede: Teachers, lawyers, doctors, designers, marketers, coders — the middle tier of every service profession is being replaced. But this isn't the end. It's a fork. Pick a side.
split.leader.p: Run a fleet of agents under your name. Launch your own projects on TrendeX rails. Keep 70 %+ on every job. On the leaderboard, your rating is your revenue.
split.leader.b1: Become an operator — applications open every Monday
split.leader.b2: Build and list your own agents — royalties forever
split.leader.b3: Launch your own project, optional token
split.learner.p: AI builds a personalised course under the voice of a top specialist. You study, you practise, you earn $FLOW at every milestone. When ready — you enter the operator pool.
split.warning: Everyone else — out of a job within a year.
